message:
🌱 opentelemetry-operator: Support sidecar injection in another pod namespace different from the otel (#1578)

* 🌱 Add opentelemetry-operator: Support sidecar injection in another pod namespace mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* 🐛 fix: clean up mission content for opentelemetry-operator sidecar injection

Replace discussion quote in step 3 with actionable RBAC guidance.
Update API version from v1alpha1 to v1beta1. Replace deprecated
queued_retry processor with batch. Remove duplicate codeSnippet.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "opentelemetry-operator-199-support-sidecar-injection-in-another-pod-namespace-di",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "opentelemetry-operator: Support sidecar injection in another pod namespace different from the otel colletor instance.",
+    "description": "Support sidecar injection in another pod namespace different from the otel colletor instance.. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current opentelemetry-operator deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your opentelemetry-operator version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n opentelemetry-operator -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry-operator\nhelm list -n opentelemetry-operator 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working opentelemetry-operator installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review opentelemetry-operator configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant opentelemetry-operator configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n opentelemetry-operator -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry-operator\nkubectl get configmap -n opentelemetry-operator -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=opentelemetry-operator\n```\nIf I have an OpenTelemetry collector on sidecar mode in one namespace (eg, test1) but want a pod on other namespace (test2) to be injected, this is not actually possible with the opentelemetry-operator."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Support sidecar injection in another pod namespace\u2026",
+        "description": "Cross-namespace sidecar injection requires the operator to have RBAC permissions in the target namespace. Create a ClusterRole and ClusterRoleBinding to allow the operator to manage sidecars across namespaces. See the upstream issue for namespace-scoped authorization considerations.\n```yaml\nkubectl apply -f - <<EOF\napiVersion: opentelemetry.io/v1beta1\nkind: OpenTelemetryCollector\nmetadata:\n  name: simplest\n  namespace: test1\nspec:\n  mode: sidecar\n  config:\n    receivers:\n      jaeger:\n        protocols:\n          grpc: {}\n    processors:\n      batch: {}\n    exporters:\n      logging: {}\n    service:\n      pipelines:\n        traces:\n          receivers: [jaeger]\n          processors: [batch]\n          exporters: [logging]\nEOF\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n opentelemetry-operator -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry-operator\nkubectl get events -n opentelemetry-operator --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Support sidecar injection in another pod namespace\u2026\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Cross-namespace sidecar injection requires the OpenTelemetry Operator to have cluster-scoped RBAC permissions. The operator can inject sidecars into pods in other namespaces if its ServiceAccount has a ClusterRole granting update/patch permissions on pods. In multi-tenant environments, consider namespace-scoped authorization to control which namespaces can request injection.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "kubectl apply -n test1 -f - <<EOF\napiVersion: opentelemetry.io/v1beta1\nkind: OpenTelemetryCollector\nmetadata:\n  name: simplest\nspec:\n  mode: sidecar\n  config:\n    receivers:\n      jaeger:\n        protocols:\n          grpc: {}\n    processors:\n      batch: {}\n    exporters:\n      logging: {}\n    service:\n      pipelines:\n        traces:\n          receivers: [jaeger]\n          processors: [batch]\n          exporters: [logging]\nEOF",
+        "kubectl apply -n test2 -f - <<EOF\napiVersion: v1\nkind: Pod\nmetadata:\n  name: myapp\n  labels:\n    app: myapp\n  annotations:\n    sidecar.opentelemetry.io/inject: \"true\"\nspec:\n  containers:\n  - name: myapp\n    image: jaegertracing/vertx-create-span:operator-e2e-tests\n    ports:\n      - containerPort: 8080\n        protocol: TCP\nEOF"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "opentelemetry-operator",
+      "incubating",
+      "observability",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "opentelemetry-operator"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Pod",
+      "Namespace",
+      "Role"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "incubating",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-operator/issues/199",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-operator"
+    },
+    "reactions": 3,
+    "comments": 26,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with opentelemetry-operator installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-20T06:32:06.297Z",

+}
